## Checklist

- [ ] Branch named `feat/<topic>` or `fix/<topic>`
- [ ] Formatter and linter run
- [ ] Change covered by tests; affected tests pass
- [ ] No dependency changes (or explicitly approved)
- [ ] Written in English; plain `-` dashes; no emoji overuse
